message:
refactor(sql): consolidate 7 execute* format functions into unified execute()

Remove executeParquet, executeDelta, executeIceberg, executeArrow,
executeAvro, executeOrc, executeXlsx. Main execute() now handles all
typed tables uniformly using preloadColumnsFromTable() and
readColumnFromTableAtIndices() generics.

executor.zig: 4868 → 4482 lines (-386 lines, -8%)
Total reduction: 6377 → 4482 lines (-1895 lines, ~30%)
